description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a dense, rounded canopy composed of numerous dark green, broad leaves. The trunk is relatively short and sturdy, branching out quickly into multiple thick limbs that support the lush foliage. The branches are arranged in an alternate pattern, creating a natural, irregular silhouette. The leaves are simple and flat, giving the tree a full and vibrant appearance, ideal for providing shade in urban parks or along sidewalks. The bark appears dark and textured, contrasting with the vivid greenery above. No roots are visible above ground, and the tree's overall form suggests it is well-suited for ornamental or shade purposes in city environments.
description: A dense, leafy deciduous tree with a rounded canopy and dark green broad leaves, supported by a sturdy trunk and thick branches. Ideal for shade and ornamental use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows a symmetrical, full canopy with a clear view of the trunk and dense foliage.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the irregular, natural branching and a slightly asymmetrical canopy with more visible gaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the densest part of the canopy, with leaves obscuring most of the trunk and branches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the alternate branching pattern and the spread of the foliage.
